What I Do

Premium Support

Executive Virtual Assistance

Complete administrative command so your calendar, inbox, and operations run with zero chaos and total precision.

Years of Excellence

About Sajid

Discipline. Precision.
Execution.

I'm Sajid Mehmood — an Executive Virtual Assistant with a background that most VAs simply don't have. After 9+ years of service as an Administrative Supervisor in the Pakistan Navy, I bring something rare to remote work: military-grade discipline, zero-tolerance for missed deadlines, and a standards-first mindset.

I'm Google and Meta Certified, have supported USA-based clients across California, and currently manage complex multi-function operations for a US operations company — handling everything from executive calendars to property listings to social media campaigns.

When you work with me, you don't just get a VA. You get a strategic partner who shows up, delivers, and protects your time like a mission.

⚓

Navy-Trained Discipline

9+ years of mission-critical admin and operations

🏆

Certified Expertise

Google, Meta, CVS Health & Project Management certified

🌐

US Client Experience

Proven remote work across US time zones & clients

What Makes Me
Different

How It Works

Simple. Smooth.
Seamless.

Getting premium VA support shouldn't be complicated. Here's how we go from first hello to fully operational in 3 steps.

01

Discovery Call

We meet for 30 minutes to understand your business, pain points, and exactly what you need handled. I assess the scope and we align on expectations.

02

Custom Proposal

I build a tailored service plan and retainer package based on your specific needs. No one-size-fits-all. You know exactly what you're getting.

03

Onboard & Execute

We onboard in 48 hours or less. I study your systems, set up workflows, and begin delivering results from day one. No long ramp-up periods.

Questions

Frequently
Asked Questions

I work fully aligned with US time zones — Eastern, Central, and Pacific Standard Time. As a current remote VA supporting California-based clients, I'm built for US business hours and can provide real-time communication and response coverage throughout your working day.
Typically within 48 hours of signing our agreement. I conduct a structured onboarding — reviewing your tools, workflows, and priorities — and am actively delivering work by day one. No lengthy ramp-up period. Military discipline means we move efficiently.
I'm proficient across Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, Trello, Asana, Notion, Slack, HubSpot CRM, Zendesk, SharePoint, Canva, Zoom, and more. If you use a tool I haven't listed, I adapt quickly — learning new systems is a core part of what I do.
Absolutely. The listed packages are starting points. Every client gets a custom proposal after our discovery call, based on your exact needs. You may only need social media and admin — or all three. We'll build the right fit for your business, not a generic bundle.
Confidentiality is foundational. My Pakistan Navy background involved handling sensitive personnel records and classified documents for 50+ member teams. Every client relationship is governed by an NDA. Your data, communications, and business information are fully protected.
Three things: background, breadth, and standards. My military background means I hold myself to a level of accountability most VAs don't. I'm certified by Google and Meta — not self-taught. And I specialize in three premium service areas, making me a complete operational partner, not just task support.

Sajid Mehmood
